{"LastUpdate":"2026-07-13 13:20 UTC","Overview":{"ReportDate":"13 July 2026","ReportTime":"8:43 AM","ReportAnnouncements":" ","ReportWhatsHappening":"

Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

Panorama loop has been packed and tilled, however there is still a small bare patch next to the boat ramp.","CrossCountryConditions":"Firm Packed","CrossCountryCover":"Fair","CrossCountryLastGroomed":"12 July 2026","CrossCountryTotalGroomed":"6","CrossCountryTotalGroomed24":"6"},"SlopeMaintenance":{"Comments":"","CubicMetersofSnow":"","CurrentStatus":"On","GroomerChoice":"-","LastUpdateDate":"05 July 2026","LastUpdateTime":"11:44 AM","AverageSnowMaking":"0"},"Parks":{"Park":[{"ParkName":"Castle Park","ParkDetail":"Ruined Castle","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Drover's Dream Park","ParkDetail":"Top of Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Panorama Park","ParkDetail":"Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"}]},"Patrol":{"PatrolDate":"13 July 2026","PatrolTime":"6:15 AM","PatrolNaturalSnowDepth":"38","PatrolFreshSnow":"12","PatrolVillageBowl":"40","PatrolSunValley":"44","PatrolNorthSide":"31","PatrolLastSnowFall":"13 July 2026","SeasonalSnowfallToDate":"","PatrolSnowCover":"Good morning. After yesterday's snow the ski resort is starting to fill in much more. Although our snow totals look less, we've actually had 12cms over the last 24 hours, this is due to snow settling. We didn't quite get the temps we were looking for overnight thus leading to a bit of rain. The snow up top has held up but make sure to wear plenty of layers and keep dry. We're looking at a high of 1 degree today and a low of -1. This is promising for little bit more snow today. Keep an eye on the website or app for changes and updates to lifts or terrain status. Stay safe, have fun ","PatrolForecast":"Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Snow falling above 1500 metres. Damaging winds possible about the ranges. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 6 and 14.","PatrolSnowChains":"Fitting on 2WD.
